import { ITERATOR_CONSTRUCTOR } from "./constructors"; import { SYM_ITERATOR } from "./symbols"; export interface Sequence { __SEROVAL_SEQUENCE__: true; v: unknown[]; t: number; d: number; } export function isSequence(value: object): value is Sequence { return '__SEROVAL_SEQUENCE__' in value; } export function createSequence(values: unknown[], throwAt: number, doneAt: number): Sequence { return { __SEROVAL_SEQUENCE__: true, v: values, t: throwAt, d: doneAt, }; } export function createSequenceFromIterable<T>(source: Iterable<T>): Sequence { const values: unknown[] = []; let throwsAt = -1; let doneAt = -1; const iterator = source[SYM_ITERATOR](); while (true) { try { const value = iterator.next(); values.push(value.value); if (value.done) { doneAt = values.length - 1; break; } } catch (error) { throwsAt = values.length; values.push(error); } } return createSequence(values, throwsAt, doneAt); } const createIterator = ITERATOR_CONSTRUCTOR(SYM_ITERATOR); export function sequenceToIterator<T>( sequence: Sequence, ): () => IterableIterator<T> { return createIterator(sequence) as unknown as () => IterableIterator<T>; }
